overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city at night, starting in a covered underpass with debris and neon advertisements, proceeding through narrow alleys with tall buildings and holographic billboards, and emerging onto an open urban street intersection. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetics.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered underpass with a low concrete ceiling and artificial lighting. A prominent Real Water billboard illuminates the right wall while debris litters the floor. The camera moves steadily forward through the corridor.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene transitions to a narrow alleyway flanked by tall industrial buildings. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the walls. A yellow food cart sits in the middle of the path as the camera continues forward.

segments.scene_description: Passing under the green awning, the environment opens into a wide plaza with large digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The ground transitions to paved tiles. A prominent All Foods billboard and holographic vending machine are visible on the right as the camera moves through the open space.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open urban street intersection with an overpass bridge visible in the distance. Traffic lights and parked cars line the street. Sparse pedestrians are visible walking in the distance as the camera approaches the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins moving steadily through a concrete corridor illuminated by a Real Water billboard and scattered debris before exiting into a narrow alleyway flanked by towering industrial buildings and holographic advertisements. As the camera passes a yellow food cart and an abandoned red car, the path narrows further under a green overhead awning and walls covered in graffiti. The environment then opens abruptly into a wide plaza of paved tiles, where the view expands to reveal massive digital billboards and a holographic vending machine. Finally, the scene shifts into a broad street intersection, moving past parked cars and traffic lights toward a distant overpass bridge and sparse pedestrians.
